_meta: Manual Elo-point adjustments for confirmed/likely absences, from ESPN injury tracker (2026-06-06, read as text). Conservative; the betting market already prices most of this, so these mainly sharpen the match-level Elo engine (which is results-only) and group-advancement calls. Each delta documented below.

_reasons.Brazil: Rodrygo (ACL) + Estevao (hamstring) + Militao out, Neymar doubtful/misses opener — wings gutted
_reasons.Argentina: Cristian Romero (MCL, key CB) + Molina out; Messi minor
_reasons.Netherlands: Xavi Simons (ACL) + de Ligt (back) + Timber (doubt) + Schouten — defense hit
_reasons.Japan: Mitoma + Minamino both out — top creators gone (Group F)
_reasons.Australia: Miller + O'Neill + others — multiple starters (Group D)
_reasons.Germany: Gnabry + Karl + Ter Stegen out, Musiala back — net modest
_reasons.Spain: Fermin out, Merino doubt; Yamal expected fit — minor
